subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses MongoDB collection to retrieve current contracted state for Adobe licenses: product line, seat count, contract end date, list price, and negotiated terms.
Generate SQL query against consumption_facts to aggregate Q4 2024 actual spend and compute 90-day usage trend (current vs. prior 90 days % change) by Adobe product line.

Reconcile sam_licenses contracted state with consumption_facts spend and usage trends. Classify each product line renewal posture (expand, hold, reduce) based on utilization vs. seats, spend momentum, and contract lifecycle. Generate renewal trajectory and recommendations with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks, minimum decomposition: (1) mongo_sam_state (small) — straightforward collection query for current license state; (2) sql_spend_trend (mid) — multi-table aggregation with time-window calculations across Q4 and 90-day periods; (3) cross_recon (frontier) — complex reconciliation task requiring signal fusion (contract state + spend + usage trend), classification logic, and strategic recommendation generation. Frontier tier is justified for cross_recon because it must infer renewal posture by analyzing divergence between contracted capacity and actual consumption patterns, account for trend momentum, and synthesize actionable guidance. No separate policy_action or multitool_plan needed — classification and recommendations are core cross_recon outputs.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_seats, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date <= '2024-09-30' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date <= '2024-09-30' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS usage_trend_pct_change FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC
